item.title: Download MiTeC EXE Explorer 3.7.5
item.description: MiTeC EXE Explorer is a Windows utility lighter is built specifically to help you collect information about the executable file. MiTeC EXE Explorer reads and displays the properties and structure of executable files and it is compatible with the file type PE32 (Portable Executable), PE32 + (64bit), NE (Windows 3.x New Executable) and VxD (Windows 9x Virtual Device Driver). The file executable .NET are also supported. MiTeC EXE Explorer - The discover executable EXE MiTeC EXE Explorer...

item.title: Download HDD Raw Copy Tool 2.6
item.description: HDD Raw Copy Tool is software that creates exact copies of SATA, IDE, SAS, SCSI or SSD hard drives. It can create sector-by-sector copies of all sectors of the hard drive (MBR, boot record, all partitions as well as the space in between). Additionally, HDD Raw Copy Tool can create accurate raw (dd) or compressed images of the entire media (including service data such as MBR, Boot Record, etc.). Features of HDD Raw Copy Tool Data recovery: make a copy of the damaged drive to attempt...
